name: autocomplete
visual_summary: A drop-down menu for filtering and selecting options. Useful for long lists of items where users need to quickly search and select an item. Use when you have a list of options and want to simplify the user's selection process.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready autocomplet component with the following characteristics:

Name: autocomplete
Description: A drop-down menu for filtering and selecting options. Useful for long lists of items where users need to quickly search and select an item. Use when you have a list of options and want to simplify the user's selection process.
Style: flat, shadow, bordered
Interactions: searchable, selectable, draggable
Tags: dropdown, filter, select

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/react/src/components/autocomplete/index.ts
import type {ComponentProps} from "react";

import {
  AutocompleteClearButton,
  AutocompleteFilter,
  AutocompleteIndicator,
  AutocompletePopover,
  AutocompleteRoot,
  AutocompleteTrigger,
  AutocompleteValue,
} from "./autocomplete";
